name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with same-day or next-day funding at physical store locations across Tennessee.
description_long:
Speedy Cash operates as a storefront lender providing short-term emergency lending solutions across Tennessee, with multiple locations including a Memphis store at 5126 Summer Avenue. The company has positioned itself as a neighborhood alternative to traditional banks for consumers needing quick access to cash for unexpected expenses. Their Memphis location operates extended hours (9am-7pm on weekdays) and maintains an in-store consultation model where applicants can review loan options, complete applications, and ask questions before committing. The company also offers ancillary financial services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit cards at most retail locations.

Speedy Cash's primary product offerings include Payday Loans (up to $425 with repayment due around the next paycheck), Lines of Credit (up to $4,000 with flexible draw and repayment), and Title Loans (up to $4,000 using vehicle equity as collateral). All products require standard documentation: valid government ID, proof of employment or income, working phone number, valid email, and proof of address. Title loans specifically require a drivable vehicle in reasonable condition and proof of vehicle insurance. The company emphasizes transparent pricing, stating borrowers "will know exactly how much it costs to borrow the funds prior to signing your loan agreement."

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through its in-store experience model, offering face-to-face consultation and document review rather than purely online processing. The company provides vehicle appraisal services in-store for title loan applicants and maintains multiple convenient locations across the Memphis area (9 store locations listed, plus Bartlett). Their extended operating hours and bilingual customer service (English 1-888-333-1360; Spanish 1-855-734-0111) reflect efforts to serve diverse customer bases. The company also supports online application initiation, allowing customers to begin the process remotely before completing in-store.

Honestly assessed, Speedy Cash serves a legitimate consumer need for emergency liquidity but operates in the high-cost lending sector where borrowers should carefully evaluate terms before committing. While the company provides transparency about costs upfront and maintains accessible physical locations with extended hours, payday and title loans typically carry substantial interest rates and fees that can create debt cycles for vulnerable borrowers. The maximum payday loan amount ($425) is relatively modest, and lines of credit and title loans require either ongoing income verification or vehicle collateral, which may not be accessible to all applicants. This lender is appropriate for genuine short-term emergencies but not a substitute for building emergency savings or accessing lower-cost credit alternatives.
pros: Multiple convenient Memphis-area locations (9 stores listed) with extended weekday hours (until 7pm Monday/Friday)
Transparent pricing model where borrowers know exact cost before signing loan documents
In-store vehicle appraisal for title loans eliminates need for separate valuation services
Lines of Credit up to $4,000 provide flexible borrowing with available credit that replenishes as principal is paid down
Bilingual customer service available in English and Spanish with dedicated phone numbers
Additional financial services including check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers at most locations
Online application initiation available to start process remotely before in-store completion
cons: Payday loans capped at $425 may be insufficient for larger emergencies, forcing borrowers to seek multiple loans
Title loans require vehicle collateral and proof of insurance, creating repayment risk tied to transportation access
No APR or fee information disclosed on website, requiring in-store consultation to understand true cost of borrowing
Payday loan structure (repayment in ~2 weeks) creates high risk of rollover/renewal debt cycles for borrowers with inconsistent income
Limited eligibility requiring active employment/income verification may exclude self-employed, gig workers, or those with irregular earnings
best_for: Employed individuals with stable paychecks needing $100-$425 for genuine short-term emergencies (medical, car repair, utility)
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency cash ($1,000-$4,000) who can reliably repay within installment timeline
Customers preferring in-person consultation and document review over purely online lending platforms
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking bilingual lending services in the Memphis Tennessee area
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed individuals with stable income facing genuine short-term emergencies who value in-person consultation and don't have access to lower-cost credit options. Critical caveat: payday and title loans carry high interest rates and fees that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; this should only be considered after exhausting alternatives like employer advances, credit union PALs, family loans, or negotiating payment plans with creditors.
services: In-store vehicle appraisal for collateral loans
Green Dot Visa debit card services
In-store loan consultation and application completion
Multiple retail locations across Memphis metro area
